title: スプリングSの後に・止まらず先へ

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I still made lots of mistakes. I have to work
harder!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Miss Bourbon! Miss Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...May I help you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
We got to see a bit of the Auburn Rocket back
there!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is looking forward to seeing the
glorious moment when you become the Triple
Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Your support is appreciated. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, w-wait! Just one question! Please, let me ask
just one question!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Miss Bourbon... Do you have any rivals?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rivals?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My data determines that such things are
unnecessary.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If I am first, then my opponents are irrelevant
factors.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Wow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: She's strong and confident. You can tell she walks her own path...
choice_data_list: Looks like you've got your work cut out for you.
Looks like you've got your work cut out for you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: …Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon... is only going to get further and further
ahead. If I want to catch up to her... then I can't
stop training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...But I will catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown is composed of three Classic
races—the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The upcoming Satsuki Sho is a 2000-meter turf
race. As a stayer, Rice Shower needs a bit more
distance to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To have our first real chance at beating Mihono
Bourbon...
choice_data_list: We should take on the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, got it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's where I'll catch up to Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: For sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Rice Shower and I resolve to begin
preparations for the Japanese Derby.
